rag_rules: Resolve all identifiers in AGREE contracts using only visible AADL features or declared helpers within the same annex.
Use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for constants and equation declarations.
generic_rules: Place component type contracts in component type scopes with visible feature references.
Use assign statements only for implementation-level output bindings.
Ensure type consistency in AGREE expressions by aligning helper declarations with actual types.
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers not present in the model's configured dependencies.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Left and right sides of binary expressions in AGREE must have matching types.
Equation declarations in AGREE must reference only visible identifiers or previously declared helpers.
anti_patterns: Do not reference unresolved identifiers or invalid types in AGREE contracts.
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use only in component type contracts.
